affirmations.text: I can meet this moment with patience and that is enough for now.
I am allowed to begin with honest kindness while staying rooted in my values.
Today I can choose with gentleness without turning against myself.
I have enough steadiness one breath at a time while I keep moving forward.
I can take one step with steady attention as I remember I am still becoming.
My attention can return without rushing and choose a helpful next action.
I am learning to trust without needing perfection and let the next step be simple.
I can make room with care and that is enough for now.
